nasb.text: Then the officials said to Baruch, “Go, hide yourself, you and Jeremiah, and do not let anyone know where you are.”

esv.text: Then the officials said to Baruch, “Go and hide, you and Jeremiah, and let no one know where you are.”

cnv.text: 眾領袖對巴錄說：“你和耶利米都要去躲藏起來；不要給人知道你們在甚麼地方。”

ccb.text: 他们说：“你和耶利米都要藏起来，不可让人知道你们在哪里。”
